summary: Iteration 114 - Grom HQ & Production Sync Testing. All 6 features verified: (1) TopNav for Grom Parent shows Calendar/Bookings icon (not Shield), (2) Stripe Identity age verification uses LIVE API (no demo fallbacks), (3) Grom Parent sidebar shows only 'Grom Archive' under Photo Tools (no Earnings, Bookings Manager, Live Sessions, On-Demand Settings), (4) BottomNav Tab 4 for Grom Parent shows Shield icon for Grom HQ, (5) Weekly Grom Report scheduled job registered in scheduler (4 jobs total), (6) Push notification helpers for Grom activity exist in push.py. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: TopNav.js lines 136-145: Grom Parent correctly gets CalendarDays icon (data-testid='topnav-bookings') linking to /bookings, NOT Shield icon
BottomNav.js lines 95-101: Grom Parent results center correctly shows Grom HQ with Shield icon
Sidebar.js lines 156-161: Grom Parent Photo Tools correctly shows ONLY 'Grom Archive' - no Earnings Dashboard, Bookings Manager, Live Sessions, or On-Demand Settings
grom_hq.py line 439: Stripe Identity VerificationSession.create() uses LIVE API - no demo fallbacks in create_age_verification endpoint
GromHQ.js startAgeVerification() opens real Stripe verification URL (https://verify.stripe.com/start/{sessionId})
scheduler.py line 407-414: weekly_grom_report_task registered with CronTrigger(day_of_week='sun', hour=14, minute=0)
push.py lines 340, 378, 410: notify_grom_activity, notify_grom_safety_alert, notify_grom_link_request helpers exist
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Grom HQ & Production Sync features verified. TopNav shows Calendar icon for Grom Parent (not Shield). BottomNav Tab 4 shows Grom HQ with Shield. Sidebar Photo Tools shows only Grom Archive. Stripe Identity uses LIVE API. Scheduler has 4 jobs including weekly grom_report. Push helpers for Grom events exist.

features_verified.topnav_calendar_icon: VERIFIED - TopNav shows CalendarDays icon (data-testid='topnav-bookings') for Grom Parent, NOT Shield
features_verified.stripe_identity_live: VERIFIED - grom_hq.py uses stripe.identity.VerificationSession.create() - LIVE API, no demo fallbacks
features_verified.sidebar_grom_archive_only: VERIFIED - Photo Tools shows only 'Grom Archive' for Grom Parent (no Earnings, Bookings Manager, Live Sessions, On-Demand Settings)
features_verified.bottomnav_grom_hq_shield: VERIFIED - BottomNav Tab 4 shows 'Grom HQ' with Shield icon for Grom Parent
features_verified.weekly_grom_report_scheduler: VERIFIED - scheduler.py logs show 4 jobs: surf_alerts (15min), story_cleanup (1hr), leaderboard_reset (monthly), grom_report (weekly)
features_verified.push_grom_helpers: VERIFIED - push.py has notify_grom_activity (line 340), notify_grom_safety_alert (line 378), notify_grom_link_request (line 410)

mocked_apis.note: Stripe Identity is LIVE with real API. Stripe payments are in test mode.
